title: Acrylic Paint Metallic, 2 Colors Gold, Silver, 110ml Gold Leaf Paint, Non Toxic, Non Fading for Art Painting, Handcrafts, Ideal for Multi-surface, Canvas, Wood, Clay, Metal
features: Stunning Metallic Finish: metallic acrylic paint set includes 2 colors gold, silver. These high performance metallic paints dry to a shiny and gloss finish, adding a unique sparkle to your artwork and décor

Non-toxic Paint: Made of quality pigments, safe, non-toxic, acid-free conforms to safety certificates: U.S. ASTM D-4236 & EU EN71. Designed for all age people, no matter professional or beginner, kids or adults

Indoor and Outdoor Versatility: Unleash your creativity with the freedom to use our gold leaf paint for both indoor and outdoor projects. Whether inside or outside, achieve artistic brilliance without constraints

Wide Applications: ARTKUNST metallic paint set can use on multi surfaces like glass, wood, metal, fabric. Feature with smudge-proof and weather-resistant, perfect for outdoor decor, add a shinning on your furniture, walls, trim, doors, crafts, and more
Easy To Use: You need to remove oil or dust on the work surface, keep surface clean and dry first. Then mix the gold paint evenly before you start painting
